dungeon: BASE-GAME SHATTERS run (~730s+, large multi-room group run on a lava/crystal Shatters floor). ALL recovered boss content is base-game RotMG Shatters: The Forgotten King (full taunt set), Royal Guardian (mini-boss, death-notifiers), and Helpless Souls (the freed-soul minions). NO ROTF-custom boss/dungeon content — corroboration only. (Likely ROTF running the base Shatters; shop/vault grid menus appear between segments.)
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+transitions: the SHATTERS layout — a dark lava/crystal multi-room dungeon (orange-checkered lava floor dominates the play area) culminating in the Forgotten King arena; the Helpless Souls / Royal Guardian rooms precede it. Interspersed grey SHOP/VAULT grid menus (between-run). Standard Shatters geometry (winding crystal corridors -> boss arena), not a ROTF-custom layout.
